introSection: Wandering Oaken's Sliding Sleighs is an upcoming roller coaster at Hong Kong Disneyland. It is expected to open in 2022 with a new Frozen-themed land.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride was announced during the D23 Expo in August 2019.

In June 2020, some track pieces arrived at the park.

sections.title: Theme
sections.content: Wandering Oaken's Sliding Sleighs will take guests on a journey through Arendelle, the Frozen kingdom. The ride begins in Oaken's shop, after which Olaf and Sven will pull the riders' sleigh to the top of the lift hill.

fullText:
Wandering Oaken's Sliding Sleighs is an upcoming roller coaster at Hong Kong Disneyland. It is expected to open in 2022 with a new Frozen-themed land.

The ride was announced during the D23 Expo in August 2019.

In June 2020, some track pieces arrived at the park.

Wandering Oaken's Sliding Sleighs will take guests on a journey through Arendelle, the Frozen kingdom. The ride begins in Oaken's shop, after which Olaf and Sven will pull the riders' sleigh to the top of the lift hill.
